ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation run */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the simulation */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the simulation */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the simulation */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the simulation */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the simulation */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the simulation belongs to */,
  "environment" TEXT /* Environment in which the simulation is run (e.g., development, production) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the simulation */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Indicates if the simulation is public or private */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last time the simulation was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run the data belongs to */,
  "time" REAL /* Time step of the data point */,
  "resistor_1_r" REAL /* Resistance value of Resistor 1 */,
  "triphasic_rectifier_1_i1_v" REAL /* Voltage value of Triphasic Rectifier 1, Phase 1 */,
  "triphasic_rectifier_1_i2_v" REAL /* Voltage value of Triphasic Rectifier 1, Phase 2 */,
  "triphasic_rectifier_1_i3_v" REAL /* Voltage value of Triphasic Rectifier 1, Phase 3 */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature at the time step */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity at the time step */,
  "resistor_1_i" REAL /* Current through Resistor 1 */,
  "triphasic_rectifier_1_i1_i" REAL /* Current through Triphasic Rectifier 1, Phase 1 */,
  "triphasic_rectifier_1_i2_i" REAL /* Current through Triphasic Rectifier 1, Phase 2 */,
  "triphasic_rectifier_1_i3_i" REAL /* Current through Triphasic Rectifier 1, Phase 3 */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the data point belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_data_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., engineer, researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has administrative privileges */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "components" (
  "component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each component */,
  "component_name" TEXT /* Name of the component (e.g., Resistor 1, Triphasic Rectifier 1) */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the component (e.g., resistor, triphasic rectifier) */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the component */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the component */,
  "part_number" TEXT /* Part number of the component */,
  "date_added" TEXT /* Date when the component was added to the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "component_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., resistance, voltage) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter */,
  "min_value" TEXT /* Minimum value of the parameter */,
  "max_value" TEXT /* Maximum value of the parameter */,
  "default_value" TEXT /* Default value of the parameter */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_component_parameters_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_components" (
  "simulation_component_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation-component mapping */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "component_id" INTEGER /* ID of the component used in the simulation */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the component used in the simulation */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or location of the component in the circuit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_component_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_components_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_components_component_id FOREIGN KEY ("component_id") REFERENCES components ("component_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the simulation */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_history" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation run */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number of the simulation */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "author" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the version change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_author FOREIGN KEY ("author") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_history_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
